form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 29-day let-up. Last start 3rd in a small field at Wolverhampton on March 10 over 1900m, 1.0 len behind Zipwire carrying 61kg at $3.10. The start before that 3rd of 8 at Kempton Park All Weather on February 11 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Mohaaraj carrying 56kg at $26. Has ability and is one of the leading chances.

formComments.title: TAB

The start before that 3rd of 8 at Kempton Park All Weather on February 11 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Mohaaraj carrying 56kg at $26. Has ability and is one of the leading chances.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up raced on the speed throughout before fading second last of 8 at Kempton Park All Weather on February 18 over 1600m, 14 len behind Warning Symbol with 61kg at $12. Last start 3rd of 8 at Doncaster on March 29 over 2000m, 1.0 len behind Arc Ole Ole with 59.5kg at $34. Sure to be a major player.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation fifth of 11 at Kempton Park All Weather September 24 over 1600m, 6 len behind See Blue carrying 58kg at $21. On debut fourth of 9 at Kempton Park All Weather August 13 over 1400m, 6 len behind Pacific Mission carrying 58kg at $19. Bold performance expected.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign eighth of 11 at Southwell All Weather October 30 over 1400m, 6 len behind Shafi carrying 60.5kg at $41. On debut ran last of 10 at Windsor September 1 over 1630m, soft track; 35 len behind Explosion with 59.5kg at $29. Certainly one to consider.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign third of 14 at Chelmsford November 6 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Starlight Time with 58kg at $34. On debut seventh of 11 at Salisbury October 2 over 1600m, 13 len behind Runman with 60.5kg at $15. Likely to measure up.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 5th of 7 at Wolverhampton on March 30 over 1900m, 7 len behind Lux Aeterna carrying 61kg at $2.90. Previously second-up ran last in a small field at Great Yarmouth on October 13 over 1400m, 7 len behind Ya Karim with 60.5kg at $9. Strips fitter and should be in the mix.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up 5th of 8 at Kempton Park All Weather on February 18 over 1600m, 6 len behind Warning Symbol with 58kg at $23. Second-up ran last in a small field at Chelmsford on March 26 over 2000m, 4.5 len behind Engross with 59kg at $6. Useful type but must improve sharply.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 39-day let-up. First-up after four months second last of 8 at Southwell All Weather on February 28 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind No Nay Data with 56.5kg at $23. Previously second-up 6th of 8 at Newbury on October 24 over 1300m, on a slow track; 10 len behind Needle Match with 60.5kg at $29. Looks tested on the first up effort.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Not seen since she finished last of 9 at Leicester October 7 over 1600m, 6 len behind Trio with 58kg at $7.50. On debut sixth of 9 at Lingfield August 4 over 1400m, 11 len behind Teewinot carrying 58kg at $12. Hard to recommend.
